# ngrok_event_subscription (Data Source)

Use this data source to look up an event subscription by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "ngrok_event_subscription" "example" {
  id = "es_2example"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) a resource identifier

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) When the Event Subscription was created (RFC 3339 format).
- `description` (String) Arbitrary customer supplied information intended to be human readable. Optional, max 255 chars.
- `destination_ids` (List of String) A list of Event Destination IDs which should be used for this Event Subscription.
- `metadata` (String) Arbitrary customer supplied information intended to be machine readable. Optional, max 4096 chars.
- `sources` (Attributes List) Sources containing the types for which this event subscription will trigger. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sources))
- `uri` (String) URI of the Event Subscription API resource.

<a id="nestedatt--sources"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sources`

Read-Only:

- `fields` (List of String) The fields included in events for this source.
- `type` (String) Type of event for which an event subscription will trigger.
- `uri` (String) URI of the Event Source API resource.
